# WKWebExtension.MatchPattern.Error.Code

**Enumeration**

Constants that indicate errors in the [doc://com.apple.webkit/documentation/WebKit/WKWebExtension/MatchPattern] domain.

## Declaration

```swift
enum Code
```

## Enumeration Cases

- **WKWebExtension.MatchPattern.Error.Code.invalidHost**: Indicates that the host component was invalid.
- **WKWebExtension.MatchPattern.Error.Code.invalidPath**: Indicates that the path component was invalid.
- **WKWebExtension.MatchPattern.Error.Code.invalidScheme**: Indicates that the scheme component was invalid.
- **WKWebExtension.MatchPattern.Error.Code.unknown**: Indicates that an unknown error occurred.

## Initializers

- **init(rawValue:)**

## Errors

- **WKWebExtension.MatchPattern.Error**: Constants that indicate errors in the [doc://com.apple.webkit/documentation/WebKit/WKWebExtension/MatchPattern] domain.
- **errorDomain**: A string that identifies the error domain.

## Conforms To

- BitwiseCopyable
- Equatable
- Hashable
- RawRepresentable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
